===''Pokémon Horizons: The Series''===
Hassel made his first appearance alongside [[Rika]] in ''[[HZ046|Welcome to Naranja Academy!]]'' when welcoming [[Liko]], [[Roy]], and [[Dot]] to [[Naranja Academy]]. Later, Hassel appeared with the other members of the [[Elite Four]] watching Liko's battle against [[Ann]].

In ''[[HZ048|Sparkle! The Glow of Fire and Art!]]'', Hassel and {{an|Nemona}} helped with some details of the annual [[Artazon Art Festival]], during the event, he discovered that Liko is [[Alex]]'s daughter. After taking Liko, Roy and Dot to meet with [[Brassius]], Hassel evaluated the works of art constructed by his students and then watched Roy's {{Tera}}stal battle against Brassius.

In ''[[HZ055|Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four]]'', Hassel took part in a [[Multi Battle|Tag Battle]] against Roy and Brassius during the [[Elite Four Tag Battle]], eventually winning the battle with his Baxcalibur and Flapple. Hassel then cried tears of joy upon seeing Roy's motivation to get stronger.

In ''[[HZ067|Shine on, Terastallization! Liko vs. Roy!]]'', Hassel and Brassius watched Roy's battle against Liko, Hassel praised Roy for his improved battling skills and was crying tears of joy when he won the match.

Hassel appeared again in ''[[HZ079|Over the Top!]]'', when the [[Rising Volt Tacklers]] appeared at the {{pal|Pokémon League}} asking for permission to go to [[Area Zero]], Hassel appeared along with the other members of the Elite Four. Later, Hassel served as a [[judge]] for the battle between Liko, Roy and Dot against [[Geeta]] and after the battle ended, he began to cry in emotion.

Hassel appeared in a fantasy in ''[[HZ096|Crash! Team Dragon Rampage!]]'', while Liko, Roy, and Dot were talking about {{type|Dragon}} Trainers.

Hassel was mentioned in ''[[HZ116|Terarium Training!]]'', where [[Cyrano]] revealed that Hassel is a great friend of [[Drayden]].

In ''[[HZ127|The Training Royale!]]'', Hassel battled against [[Ult]], using his Baxcalibur to battle against Ult's {{p|Dragonite}}. After a tough battle, Hassel emerged victorious. Earlier on, Hassel seemed to be familiar with Ult's Dragonite, suggesting that he knew Ult's father, {{OBP|Salt|Horizons}}.

====Character====
In the past, Hassel mentored Brassius during his times of insecurity with art. Hassel has a gentle personality, but also has a tendency to get overly emotional and cry with tears of joy upon admiring another person's character and progress. He is also very proud and caring of his students as a teacher and encourages them whenever they make any form of progress.

|desc={{p|Baxcalibur}} is Hassel's second known Pokémon and his main battling partner. It was used alongside Flapple against [[Roy's Fuecoco]] and [[Brassius]]'s {{p|Dolliv}}, eventually winning the battle.

In ''[[HZ127|The Training Royale!]]'', Baxcalibur was used to battle against [[Ult]], where it battled against Ult's {{p|Dragonite}} and won.

Baxcalibur's known moves are {{m|Ice Shard}}, {{m|Glaive Rush}}, {{m|Blizzard}}, and {{m|Protect}}, and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Thermal Exchange}}.}}
